prompt:
Final lifestyle 5 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s sitting on a low cushioned bench in a sunlit modern home library / reading corner, mid-morning, in BRIGHT CLEAN DIRECT NATURAL DAYLIGHT pouring through tall windows on the right side of the frame. She lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE delicately between her thumb and index finger toward her parted lips with a soft warm smile, mid-bite, an open book softly out-of-focus on her lap. She wears a soft cream chunky-knit cardigan over a fitted oat tank, warm-cream lounge pants, hair in a relaxed messy low bun, fresh-faced subtle glow.

>>> THE JAR — REALISTIC SCALE + CLEAN LIGHT BOUNCE <<<
A small realistic-sized Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (real supplement-bottle scale — roughly the size of a coffee mug, NOT oversized) sits on a small wooden side-table beside her in the SAME bright direct daylight. SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — runs down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand detail reads sharply. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the side-table. Beside the jar a small ceramic dish holds 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES in the same daylight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' side panel, lid off.

Background: a softly out-of-focus warm modern home library — wood bookshelves with hardcover books, a tall potted fiddle-leaf plant in the corner, soft white walls, a fluffy beige rug, tall windows pouring in bright open daylight. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT from the right wrapping BOTH the jar AND the woman uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off skin and glossy plastic. NO heavy shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman seated, gummy in the upper-third near her face, small realistic-sized jar in the lower-third with clear specular gleam.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture, sharp focus on jar with clean reflections, no AI artifacts.
